# siteTheme

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

CRUD operations for SiteTheme records via app CLI

## Usage

```bash
app site-theme list
app site-theme get --id <value>
app site-theme create --databaseId <value> --siteId <value> --theme <value>
app site-theme update --id <value> [--databaseId <value>] [--siteId <value>] [--theme <value>]
app site-theme delete --id <value>
```

## Examples

### List all siteTheme records

```bash
app site-theme list
```

### Create a siteTheme

```bash
app site-theme create --databaseId "value" --siteId "value" --theme "value"
```

### Get a siteTheme by id

```bash
app site-theme get --id <value>
```
